channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ICE denies having a protester database. But a letter to Congress sheds more light
item.description: A previously undisclosed letter to Congress from the former ICE head reveals the agency collects data on individuals suspected of potentially unlawful...

item.title: China reâcenters North Korea ties as nuclear silence reshapes balance
item.description: Xi's silence on North Korea's nuclear program came as Kim sought to convince the world that his country's nuclear status is irreversible...

item.title: Bill Gates to testify before Congress about Epstein ties
item.description: Gates will participate in a closed-door hearing with the House Oversight Committee regarding his connection to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

item.title: World Cup kicks off: key details and viewing guide
item.description: This summer, 48 men's national teams compete in the largest World Cup ever. Here are the basics to get started.
